patch.value: External report reproduction: node dist/cli.js get <id> --json | jq -r 'invalid(' emits unhandled write EPIPE stack traces. Implement additive handling with deterministic exit semantics and no runtime crash output.
External follow-up: suppress EPIPE stack traces in piped output
Handle stdout/stderr broken-pipe writes as expected shell behavior so pm does not emit unhandled runtime stacks in piped workflows.
Broken-pipe writes in standard piped workflows are handled without Node stack traces; behavior remains stable for non-EPIPE failures and is covered by unit/runtime tests.
